title: Trump administration proposes 25% tariff on Brazilian goods over unfair trade practices
summary_full: U.S Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said that the investigation under Section 301 was launched at the direction of U.S. President Donald Trump.
summary_public: U.S Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said that the investigation under Section 301 was launched at the direction of U.S. President Donald Trump.
